items.text: The US government announced a $5 billion program to apply AI to tackling chronic diseases and accelerating drug discovery and development.
items.text_zh: 美国政府宣布投入 50 亿美元，利用 AI 攻克慢性病并加速药物研发。

items.text: Tencent is reportedly merging the teams behind its two AI products Workbuddy and QClaw to consolidate overlapping efforts.
items.text_zh: 消息称腾讯正整合 Workbuddy 与 QClaw 两款 AI 产品的团队，收拢重叠业务。

items.text: Security startup Glow emerged from stealth at a $1.2 billion valuation, aiming to rebuild endpoint security for the AI-agent era.
items.text_zh: 安全初创公司 Glow 结束隐身模式，以 12 亿美元估值亮相，瞄准 AI Agent 时代重构终端安全。

items.text: An unconfirmed rumor of a deal between Anthropic and robotics startup Physical Intelligence swept AI Twitter, with neither company commenting.
items.text_zh: 一则关于 Anthropic 与机器人初创公司 Physical Intelligence 达成交易的未证实传闻席卷 AI 推特圈，两家公司均未回应。

items.text: Tencent's open-weight Hy3 ranked #5 among open models in LMArena's Agent Arena (#25 overall) and #2 open model in the Frontend Code Arena, based on 8K+ live agentic sessions.
items.text_zh: 腾讯开源权重模型 Hy3 在 LMArena Agent Arena 开源模型中排名第 5（总榜第 25），前端代码竞技场开源第 2，成绩基于 8000 多场真实 Agent 会话。

items.text: Substack integrated Pangram's AI detector so readers can check whether newsletters and blogs were written by AI.
items.text_zh: Substack 接入 Pangram 的 AI 检测器，让读者可以查验新闻通讯和博客是否由 AI 撰写。

items.text: Cursor doubled usage limits for all individual and teams plans, covering Grok, Composer, and its upcoming in-house models.
items.text_zh: Cursor 将所有个人版与团队版套餐的用量上限翻倍，覆盖 Grok、Composer 及其即将推出的自研模型。

items.text: Synthesia is expanding its AI corporate-training platform beyond avatar videos into interactive live coaching sessions.
items.text_zh: Synthesia 将其 AI 企业培训平台从数字人视频拓展至互动式实时辅导场景。

items.text: OpenAI launched Presence, an enterprise product for deploying trusted voice and chat agents across customer-facing and internal workflows.
items.text_zh: OpenAI 发布企业级产品 Presence，帮助公司在客服与内部工作流中部署可信赖的语音和文字 AI Agent。

items.text: Claude Cowork can now learn skills from screen recordings: users demonstrate a task while narrating, and Claude turns it into a repeatable skill.
items.text_zh: Claude Cowork 新增"录屏教学"：用户边操作边口述录下屏幕演示，Claude 即可将整个流程转化为可反复执行的技能。

items.text: A randomized trial across 1,559 Pakistani judges found JudgeGPT, a GPT-4 legal assistant, raised case resolutions 6.3%, returning $38.50 per dollar invested.
items.text_zh: 一项覆盖 1559 名巴基斯坦法官的随机试验显示，基于 GPT-4 的法律助手 JudgeGPT 使结案量提升 6.3%，每投入 1 美元回报 38.5 美元。

items.text: Google released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber, a cheaper and more token-efficient Flash tier built for agentic workloads, with Gemini 3.5 Pro still in testing.
items.text_zh: Google 发布 Gemini 3.6 Flash、3.5 Flash-Lite 和 3.5 Flash Cyber，打造更便宜、更省 token 的 Flash 梯队主攻 Agent 负载，Gemini 3.5 Pro 仍在测试中。

items.text: A federal judge approved Anthropic's $1.5 billion copyright settlement with book authors, the largest such payout to date, with only 350 authors opting out.
items.text_zh: 美国联邦法官批准 Anthropic 与图书作者达成的 15 亿美元版权和解，为迄今最大规模的同类赔付，仅 350 位作者选择退出。

items.text: Mistral announced an expanded global strategic partnership with Microsoft to bring controllable frontier AI to enterprises and regulated industries.
items.text_zh: Mistral 宣布与微软扩大全球战略合作，为企业和强监管行业提供可自主掌控的前沿 AI。

items.text: Luma AI integrated Google Ads, letting advertisers feed in winning creatives and generate ready-to-run new variations directly inside Luma.
items.text_zh: Luma AI 接入 Google Ads：广告主导入表现最好的素材，即可在 Luma 内直接生成可投放的新变体。
